hints: WHERE filters individual rows BEFORE grouping, so it can't see an aggregate like COUNT(*) -- to filter on the result of an aggregate, you need HAVING, which runs AFTER the groups are formed.
Add a HAVING clause after GROUP BY branch_id that keeps only groups where COUNT(*) is greater than 1.
SELECT branch_id, COUNT(*) AS headcount FROM employee GROUP BY branch_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
